export_xs_hrpl_pd_smart_salary.description: DAG выгружает данные из таблиц схемы default (поток через xStream)

load_delta.where: flag_ins = 10 and i_pernr > 0 and ({get_delta_condition_placeholder('smart_salary')}) and report_date is not null and deviation_str <> ''
load_delta.tail: order by uuid, i_pernr, report_date, date_insert desc limit 1 by uuid, i_pernr, report_date ), t_10_insight_by_person as ( select tenant , company , person_id , right(concat('00000000', person_parameter_text), 8) as employee_id , report_date_from as report_date , trim(visitParamExtractRaw(json, 'deviation')) as deviation_str , toDecimal32(deviation_str, 2) AS deviation , insert_time from insights.insights_by_person final where flag_ins = 10 and report_type = 0 and ({get_delta_condition_placeholder('smart_salary')}) and deviation_str <> '' order by flag_ins, report_type, report_date_from, tenant, person_id, employee_id, structure_type limit 1 by flag_ins, report_type, report_date_from, tenant, person_id, employee_id ) select {get_export_time_placeholder('smart_salary')} as export_time , insert_time , tenant , company , person_id , employee_id , report_date , deviation from t_10_insight_for_postgre union all select {get_export_time_placeholder('smart_salary')} as export_time , insert_time , tenant , company , person_id , employee_id , report_date , deviation from t_10_insight_by_person order by tenant , company , person_id , employee_id , report_date , deviation settings enable_global_with_statement = 1

update_exp.joins: LEFT JOIN (SELECT *, nonkey_hash FROM evolution_export.onsiteactivities_workload_exp) AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id AND t1.teacher_id = t2.teacher_id
